stemHtml: Under ICAO Annex 9, when crew members enter or depart a contracting state, that state shall…

options.a: Facilitate and expedite their personal inspection and baggage inspection by verifying their CMCs.
options.b: Require a full visa to verify crew member identity.
options.c: Facilitate and expedite their baggage inspection only; crew members themselves are subject to the same procedures as passengers.
options.d: Facilitate and expedite their personal inspection only; crew baggage is subject to the same procedures as passenger baggage.
